title: haemax massonii
intro: Haeckel's beard lichen, also known as Haematomma massonii, is a type of lichen that belongs to the family Haematommataceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and antifungal properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Haematomma massonii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiviral agent. Haematomma massonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health conditions.
